top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Laboratory lab
JOIN Patient pat ON lab.ID = pat.ID
WHERE lab.ALP <= (SELECT MAX(ALP) FROM Laboratory WHERE ALP IS NOT NULL)
AND lab.ALP >= (SELECT MIN(ALP) FROM Laboratory WHERE ALP IS NOT NULL)
AND pat.Admission = 'outpatient';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Laboratory lab
JOIN Patient pat ON lab.ID = pat.ID
WHERE lab.ALP <= (SELECT MAX(ALP) FROM Laboratory WHERE ALP IS NOT NULL)
AND lab.ALP >= (SELECT MIN(ALP) FROM Laboratory WHERE ALP IS NOT NULL)
AND pat.Admission = 'outpatient';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Laboratory.ID) 
FROM Laboratory 
INNER JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID 
WHERE Laboratory.ALP = 'normal' AND Patient.Description = 'outpatient';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Laboratory lab
JOIN Patient pat ON lab.ID = pat.ID
WHERE lab.ALP <= (SELECT MAX(ALP) FROM Laboratory WHERE ALP IS NOT NULL)
AND lab.ALP >= (SELECT MIN(ALP) FROM Laboratory WHERE ALP IS NOT NULL)
AND pat.Admission = 'outpatient';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Laboratory.ID) 
FROM Laboratory 
INNER JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID 
WHERE Laboratory.ALP = 'normal' AND Patient.Description = 'outpatient';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Laboratory lab
JOIN Patient pat ON lab.ID = pat.ID
WHERE lab.ALP <= (SELECT MAX(ALP) FROM Laboratory WHERE ALP IS NOT NULL)
AND lab.ALP >= (SELECT MIN(ALP) FROM Laboratory WHERE ALP IS NOT NULL)
AND pat.Admission = 'outpatient';
